episode.title: The Shotgun Decree
episode.tone: calm David Attenborough-style narration with dry academic humor

voice.desc: British male narrator, calm, deep, documentary

beats.narration: In the vast and chaotic ecosystem of human cooperation, there exists a most remarkable survival mechanism.
beats.footage_prompt: A bustling highway with cars moving in both directions. The front passenger seat is vacant.

beats.narration: It is swift. It is ruthless. It is the Shotgun Decree.
beats.direction: Close-ups of drivers staring at each other, tension rising.
beats.footage_prompt: A close-up of a driver's face, eyes fixed on another car in front.

beats.narration: Observe the pack as they scramble for the front passenger seat. It is a spectacle of territorial pre-emption.
beats.direction: Energetic, slow-motion footage of drivers competing for the seat.
beats.footage_prompt: A slow-motion shot of several cars moving in close proximity to each other, with drivers gesturing and pointing.

beats.narration: The Shotgun Decree is a merciless arbiter of social hierarchy. The winner takes the seat, and the loser... well, they lose.
beats.direction: Dramatic reveal of the loser's face, desaturated and cinematic.
beats.footage_prompt: A close-up shot of a defeated driver's face, with a mixture of disappointment and resignation.

beats.narration: And so, the defeated specimen is left to carry the burden of this enduring custom.
beats.direction: Melancholic footage of the loser getting out of their car and walking away.
beats.footage_prompt: A shot of a driver slowly getting out of their car and walking away, looking dejected.

beats.narration: Social scientists have long marveled at the elegance of this mechanism. No formal governance, no voting, no justice whatsoever.
beats.direction: Fake academic examination with mock graphs and statistics.
beats.footage_prompt: A shot of a whiteboard with complex graphs and charts, accompanied by a serious-looking academic.

credits.script: The Shotgun Decree – A Study in Territorial Pre-emption
